name: Section IV Regulations applicable for NBFC-UL
content:
**Section IV Regulations applicable for NBFC-UL**

Section IV Regulations applicable for NBFC-UL Regulatory instructions specified in Section IV shall be applicable to NBFC-UL. In addition, regulatory instructions applicable to NBFC-BL as specified in Section II and applicable to NBFC-ML as specified in Section III shall also be applicable to NBFC-UL, unless stated otherwise.
